step1_body:
Test -

Your website caught my eye - the positioning is clear and the branding is consistent.

Then I went to your actual site. It looks a decade behind what you're doing on social.

I went ahead and redesigned the homepage. It's done.

Want to see it?

- [Name].
step2_body:
Test -

Genuine question, not a pitch:

If a buyer Googled you right now and landed on your site, would you be proud of what they see?

I already redesigned it. Takes 10 minutes on a screen share to walk through it.

Worth it?

- [Name].
step3_body:
Test -

You are building something real. The listings are there. The social presence is there.

The website is the one thing that doesn't match.

You already know this. I just built the fix.

Yes or no - worth a look?

- [Name].
step4_body:
Test -

Last email. Genuinely.

I redesigned your homepage because I looked at your work and thought it deserved better than what's representing it online. That's it.

If you ever want to see it - now or six months from now - just reply here.

Either way, keep going.

- [Name].
